notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Nick Loftin.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Salvador Perez. Ceddanne Rafaela scores. Nick Sogard out at 3rd. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd. Carlos Narváez out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Elias Díaz reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
